message:
test(spotlight, quake-map): add 27 unit tests for spotlight utilities and map collision

Spotlight (15 tests): width_u64_to_usize overflow, ascii_display_width with
control chars, display_width pure ASCII and control, is_zero_width_codepoint
for combining marks/controls/bidi, text wrap zero-width/paragraphs/single-word,
panel_size with progress/hints, panel_position fallback/no-target/forced-left.

Quake map (12 tests): circle_intersects_segment miss/hit/endpoint/tangent/
zero-length, empty map defaults, floor/ceiling height outside rooms,
no collision in open area, player_start tuple, e1m1 room count,
supportive_floor outside rooms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
